_comment: DO NOT EDIT: FILE GENERATED AUTOMATICALLY BY PTERODACTYL PANEL - PTERODACTYL.IO
name: Steel
author: JunkyDeveloper@gmail.com
description:
Steel is a lightweight Rust implementation of the Minecraft server.

Steel is still in BETA, so bugs can happen and some features are not implemented.

installation.script:
#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail
echo "Install dependencies"
apt-get install -y jq
echo "Downloading Steel"
cd mnt/server
## this is a simple script to use the github API for release versions.
## this requires the egg has a variable for VERSION
## this supports using oauth/personal access tokens via GITHUB_USER and GITHUB_OAUTH_TOKEN (both are required.)
## if you are getting hit with GitHub API limit issues then you need to have the user and token set.
if [ -z "${GITHUB_USER}" ] && [ -z "${GITHUB_OAUTH_TOKEN}" ] ; then
    echo -e "using anon api call"
else
    echo -e "user and oauth token set"
    alias curl='curl -u ${GITHUB_USER}:${GITHUB_OAUTH_TOKEN} '
fi
## get release info and download links
LATEST_JSON=$(curl --silent "https://api.github.com/repos/Steel-Foundation/SteelMC/releases/latest")
RELEASES=$(curl --silent "https://api.github.com/repos/Steel-Foundation/SteelMC/releases")
if [ -z "${VERSION}" ] || [ "${VERSION}" == "latest" ]; then
    DOWNLOAD_URL=$(echo ${LATEST_JSON} | jq .assets | jq -r .[].browser_download_url | grep -i steel-linux)
else
    VERSION_CHECK=$(echo ${RELEASES} | jq -r --arg VERSION "${VERSION}" '.[] | select(.tag_name==$VERSION) | .tag_name')
    if [ "${VERSION}" == "${VERSION_CHECK}" ]; then
        DOWNLOAD_URL=$(echo ${RELEASES} | jq -r --arg VERSION "${VERSION}" '.[] | select(.tag_name==$VERSION) | .assets[].browser_download_url' | grep -i steel-linux)
    else
        echo -e "defaulting to latest release"
        DOWNLOAD_URL=$(echo ${LATEST_JSON} | jq .assets | jq -r .[].browser_download_url)
    fi
fi
echo "$DOWNLOAD_URL"
curl -L --fail "$DOWNLOAD_URL" -o steel
chmod +x steel
echo "Installation successful"
exit 0

variables.name: Steel Version
variables.description: The version from the release page in github: https://github.com/Steel-Foundation/SteelMC/releases

variables.name: Github User
variables.description: If you run out of downloads add your github user name here

variables.name: Github OAUTH Token
variables.description: Token to for your github users, only needed for rate limit
